subject: [PATCH] mm/mincore: handle non-swap entries before !CONFIG_SWAP guard

2026-06-08.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the Linux kernel's mincore function where it incorrectly reports non-swap entries as non-resident on systems without swap enabled. The fix involves moving the check for !CONFIG_SWAP below the early return for non-swap entries, ensuring that only true swap entries trigger warnings and non-shmem pages follow the existing 'uptodate / non-shmem' path.
